description: Explicit release type mapping. Not inferred from changelog headings.

2.10.0.label: Public Evidence Surface / Dashboard Truth Boundary

changes: Relay auth fail-closed (empty token/secret rejected, min 16-char secret)
WebSocket-bound peer authorization via findPeerBySocket()
Room workspace fail-closed (ROOM_WORKSPACE_MISSING)
Path-boundary matching (exact file, directory boundary)
15 relay security regression tests
Release truth alignment
v2.14.8.label: Relay Security & Release Truth Hotfix

changes: create-release dist/ creation fix
final_artifact_state on all artifacts
Platform status built-but-unverified for CI-only builds
v2.14.9.label: Release Artifact Pipeline Correction

changes: F1: Missing roadmap/ directory no longer crashes deps/export (P0 beta blocker)
F2: Provider API path configurable via ORQESTRA_AI_API_PATH
F3: Provider timeout increased from 45s to 120s
3 Rust regression tests for empty-roadmap state
3 Python provider tests for API path and timeout
v2.14.10.label: External Repo Empty-State Hotfix

changes: P0-1: Environment checks moved to async (spawn_blocking) — no more UI freeze
P0-2: Beta readiness no longer calls readiness twice (eliminated duplicate scan)
P0-3: Guided Next Steps panel replaces raw check dump
P0-4: Feedback capture with free text, friction rating, would-continue field
P1: Missing roadmap is optional, not blocking
P1: AI unavailable degrades agents only, not whole beta path
P1: Technical details collapsed by default
v2.14.11.label: Beta Onboarding UX + Responsiveness Hotfix

changes: 13-stage lifecycle model (Orient through Evolve)
Append-only event log in .Orqestra/lifecycle/
State derivation by replay
Gate enforcement before stage advancement
PTM v0.1.2 migration to .Orqestra/lifecycle/
Mechanical repo scanner (Orient stage)
Feature intake creation (Discover stage)
PRD draft generation with F4 mitigation (Define stage)
Issue graph preview (Plan stage)
LifecycleHome UI with stage indicator and role/skill/gate panels
30 lifecycle integration tests
v2.15.0.label: Lifecycle Foundation
